runs.context_blueprint: {"language": "C", "build_system": "autotools (configure, make, make install) with bootstrap via autogen.sh", "package_manager": "apt", "build_commands": ["sh autogen.sh", "./configure --prefix=/usr/local", "make", "make install"], "install_commands": ["apt-get update", "apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends build-essential autoconf automake libtool pkg-config bison libevent-dev libncurses-dev"], "runtime_requirements": {"language_version": "gnu99", "system_packages": ["build-essential", "autoconf", "automake", "libtool", "pkg-config", "bison", "libevent-dev", "libncurses-dev"]}, "repo_type": "cli_tool", "base_image": "debian: oldstable-slim", "base_image_rationale": "Slim Debian base provides a lightweight, stable environment suitable for building a C autotools project with apt.", "pitfalls": ["The build relies on autotools (autoconf/automake/libtool) and yacc (provided by bison); ensure these packages are installed in the image.", "Using an oldstable-slim base may yield older library/tool versions; you may encounter compatibility issues on newer tmux configurations.", "The project can enable fuzzing via Autoconf; ensure appropriate flags and libraries are available if you intend to build fuzzers."], "notes": "This blueprint targets building tmux (next-3.7) from source using autotools on a Debian slim base. The final binary typically installs to /usr/local/bin/tmux and uses the system ncurses/libevent headers. Adjust base image or additional packages if you need systemd integration or jemalloc/utf8proc options."}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM debian:oldstable-slim

# Build tmux from source using autotools bootstrap (autogen.sh)
# and install into /usr/local

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install build-time dependencies
RUN set -eux \
    apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        build-essential \
        autoconf \
        automake \
        libtool \
        pkg-config \
        bison \
        libevent-dev \
        libncurses-dev \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy source and build
WORKDIR /src
COPY . /src

RUN sh autogen.sh \
    && ./configure --prefix=/usr/local \
    && make -j"$(nproc)" \
    && make install

# Default to showing tmux version when running the container
ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/local/bin/tmux"]
CMD ["-V"]
"}

{"path": " .dockerignore", "content": "# Ignore version control and build artifacts
.git/
*.o
*.a
*.so
*.lo
*.la
*.dll
*.dylib
build/
*CMakeFiles*
Makefile.in
config/
## tmux builds can generate these
*.log
*.mk
*.dSYM/

"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM debian:bookworm-slim

# Build tmux from source using autotools bootstrap (autogen.sh)
# and install into /usr/local

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install build-time dependencies
RUN set -eux \
    apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        build-essential \
        autoconf \
        automake \
        libtool \
        pkg-config \
        bison \
        libevent-dev \
        libncurses-dev \
        ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy source and build
WORKDIR /src
COPY . /src

RUN ./autogen.sh \
    && ./configure --prefix=/usr/local \
    && make -j"$(nproc)" \
    && make install

# Default to showing tmux version when running the container
ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/local/bin/tmux"]
CMD ["-V"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM debian:stable-slim

# Build tmux from source using autotools bootstrap (autogen.sh)
# and install into /usr/local

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install build-time dependencies
RUN set -eux \
    apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        build-essential \
        autoconf \
        automake \
        libtool \
        pkg-config \
        bison \
        libevent-dev \
        libncurses-dev \
        ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy source and build
WORKDIR /src
COPY . /src

RUN ./autogen.sh \
    && ./configure --prefix=/usr/local \
    && make -j"$(nproc)" \
    && make install

# Default to showing tmux version when running the container
ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/local/bin/tmux"]
CMD ["-V"]
"}

runs.context_blueprint: {"language": "C", "build_system": "make", "package_manager": "none", "build_commands": ["./autogen.sh", "./configure", "make -j$(nproc)", "make install"], "install_commands": ["apt-get update -y", "apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends build-essential autoconf automake pkg-config libevent-dev libncurses-dev", "rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*"], "runtime_requirements": {"language_version": "gnu99", "system_packages": ["libevent-2.*", "libncurses5", "libtinfo5"]}, "repo_type": "cli_tool", "base_image": "debian:oldstable-slim", "base_image_rationale": "Slim Debian base provides a compact environment suitable for building a C-based CLI tool with Autotools.", "pitfalls": ["The oldstable-slim base may ship older compilers and libraries; ensure dependencies match Autotools expect.", "Some systems require libreadline or libutil; verify runtime libs on target distro.", "tmux's build is sensitive to libevent and ncurses versions; mismatches can cause build failures.", "No tests are included in the build; ensure to run functional tests after install."], "notes": "Project tmux uses Autotools (configure.ac, Makefile.am). The autogen.sh script prepares the build system; the Makefile defines tmux binary and manpage generation."}
runs.final_dockerfile:
# Multi-stage Dockerfile to build tmux from source on Debian oldstable-slim
# Stage 1: build
FROM debian:oldstable-slim AS builder
LABEL maintainer="BuildAgent"
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install build dependencies (Autotools, libevent, ncurses, yacc/bison, etc.)
RUN apt-get update -y \
 && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    build-essential \
    autoconf \
    automake \
    pkg-config \
    libevent-dev \
    libncurses-dev \
    bison \
    flex \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy source and build
WORKDIR /src
COPY . .

# Ensure autogen.sh is executable
RUN chmod +x autogen.sh

RUN sh autogen.sh \
 && ./configure \
 && make -j$(nproc) \
 && make install

# Stage 2: runtime image
FROM debian:oldstable-slim
LABEL maintainer="BuildAgent"
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install runtime dependencies (ncurses libraries). Libevent will be provided from /usr/local
RUN apt-get update -y \
 && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    libncurses5 \
    libtinfo5 \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy installed files from builder
COPY --from=builder /usr/local /usr/local

# Ensure the dynamic linker can find /usr/local/lib
ENV LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/usr/local/lib:${LD_LIBRARY_PATH}

# Default command: run tmux
CMD ["tmux"]

RUN sh autogen.sh \

 && make install

# Stage 2: runtime image
FROM debian:oldstable-slim
LABEL maintainer="BuildAgent"
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install runtime dependencies
RUN apt-get update -y \
 && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    libevent-2.* \
    libncurses5 \
    libtinfo5 \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy installed files from builder
COPY --from=builder /usr/local /usr/local

# Default command: run tmux
CMD ["tmux"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage Dockerfile to build tmux from source on Debian oldstable-slim
# Stage 1: build
FROM debian:oldstable-slim AS builder
LABEL maintainer="BuildAgent"
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install build dependencies (Autotools, libevent, ncurses, yacc/bison, etc.)
RUN apt-get update -y \
 && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    build-essential \
    autoconf \
    automake \
    pkg-config \
    libevent-dev \
    libncurses-dev \
    bison \
    flex \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy source and build
WORKDIR /src
COPY . .

# Ensure autogen.sh is executable
RUN chmod +x autogen.sh

RUN sh autogen.sh \
 && ./configure \
 && make -j$(nproc) \
 && make install

# Stage 2: runtime image
FROM debian:oldstable-slim
LABEL maintainer="BuildAgent"
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install runtime dependencies
RUN apt-get update -y \
 && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    libevent-2.* \
    libncurses5 \
    libtinfo5 \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy installed files from builder
COPY --from=builder /usr/local /usr/local

# Ensure the dynamic linker can find /usr/local/lib
RUN echo '/usr/local/lib' > /etc/ld.so.conf.d/usrlocal.conf \
 && ldconfig

# Default command: run tmux
CMD ["tmux"]
"}
